bvarnet 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Build a complete prior specification for bvarnet

Source: R/set_priors.R
set_priors.Rd

Returns a bvarnet_priors object containing a bvarnet_prior for every model parameter type. Any argument left as NULL uses the package default.

Usage

set_priors(beta = NULL, phi = NULL, sd_u = NULL, kappa = NULL, sigma = NULL)

Arguments

beta

Prior for fixed-effect regression coefficients.

phi

Prior for lag coefficients.

sd_u

Prior for random-effect standard deviations (half-prior).

kappa

Prior for ordinal cut-points (ordinal models only).

sigma

Prior for residual standard deviation (gaussian models only; half-prior).

Value

A bvarnet_priors S3 object.

On this page
